ns0:entry.ns0:title: Wei-Shaw/sub2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Wei-Shaw/sub2api
Language: go
Sub2API-CRS2 一站式开源中转服务，让 Claude、Openai 、Gemini、Antigravity订阅统一接入，支持拼车共享，更高效分摊成本，原生工具无缝使用。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: containers/podman
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/containers/podman
Language: go
Podman: A tool for managing OCI containers and pods.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/Fabric
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/Fabric
Language: go
Fabric is an open-source framework for augmenting humans using AI. It provides a modular system for solving specific problems using a crowdsourced set of AI prompts that can be used anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: distribution/distribution
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/distribution/distribution
Language: go
The toolkit to pack, ship, store, and deliver container content

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fleetdm/fleet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fleetdm/fleet
Language: go
Open device management

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gastownhall/beads
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gastownhall/beads
Language: go
Beads - A memory upgrade for your coding agent

ns0:entry.ns0:title: go-delve/delve
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/go-delve/delve
Language: go
Delve is a debugger for the Go programming language.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google/osv-scanner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google/osv-scanner
Language: go
Vulnerability scanner written in Go which uses the data provided by https://osv.dev

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gorilla/websocket
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gorilla/websocket
Language: go
Package gorilla/websocket is a fast, well-tested and widely used WebSocket implementation for Go.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grafana/loki
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grafana/loki
Language: go
Like Prometheus, but for logs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/terraform-provider-azurerm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform-provider-azurerm
Language: go
Terraform provider for Azure Resource Manager

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hatchet-dev/hatchet
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hatchet-dev/hatchet
Language: go
🪓 Run Background Tasks at Scale

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jackc/pgx
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jackc/pgx
Language: go
PostgreSQL driver and toolkit for Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kubernetes-sigs/gateway-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kubernetes-sigs/gateway-api
Language: go
Repository for the next iteration of composite service (e.g. Ingress) and load balancing APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: looplj/axonhub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/looplj/axonhub
Language: go
⚡️ Open-source AI Gateway — Use any SDK to call 100+ LLMs. Built-in failover, load balancing, cost control & end-to-end tracing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/masterking32/MasterDnsVPN
Language: go
Advanced DNS tunneling VPN for censorship bypass, optimized beyond DNSTT and SlipStream with low-overhead ARQ, resolver load balancing, high packet-loss stability and speed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/typescript-go
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/typescript-go
Language: go
Staging repo for development of native port of TypeScript

ns0:entry.ns0:title: operacle/checkcle
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/operacle/checkcle
Language: go
CheckCle is a self-hosted, open-source monitoring platform for seamless, real-time full-stack systems, applications, and infrastructure. It provides real-time uptime monitoring, distributed checks, incident tracking, and alerts. All deployable anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pingcap/tidb
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb
Language: go
TiDB is built for agentic workloads that grow unpredictably, with ACID guarantees and native support for transactions, analytics, and vector search. No data silos. No noisy neighbors. No infrastructure ceiling.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pressly/goose
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pressly/goose
Language: go
A database migration tool. Supports SQL migrations and Go functions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sivchari/kumo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sivchari/kumo
Language: go
A lightweight AWS service emulator written in Go

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vxcontrol/pentagi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vxcontrol/pentagi
Language: go
Fully autonomous AI Agents system capable of performing complex penetration testing tasks
